editorial_accuracy.notes: 133 evidence blocks, zero inline markers. All sources clean. Timeline page correctly parses all 30 chapter dateRanges.

information_design.notes: New interactive timeline provides chronological navigation across all chapters. Era-based color coding and filtering. Time span visualization per chapter.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Timeline page: alternating card layout, hover states, responsive. Service worker enables offline reading. Nav updated with Timeline link.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Timeline page lazy-loaded. Service worker properly scoped — excludes GA4 and Stripe. Clean separation of concerns.

accessibility.notes: Timeline cards are focusable Link elements. Era filter buttons have clear active states. Offline fallback improves accessibility.

security.notes: CSP updated for GA4. Service worker respects same-origin policy. No new attack vectors.
